refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid fault recovery, which are key contributors to operational availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure actual uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution.
FR2: Enable rapid detection and recovery from faults within the NGHE solution.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust fault detection and diagnostics system.
DP2: Design modular vehicle and teleoperation components for quick replacement and repair.
DP3: Provide continuous monitoring and predictive maintenance via Safety Services.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement robust fault detection and diagnostics system.

potential_sources: Interaction between fault detection and teleoperation control logic.
Dependency on Safety Services for alerting and monitoring.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically addresses fault detection independently but requires interfaces with Teleoperation and Safety Services for alerts and monitoring.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable telemetry data is available for diagnostics.
Risk of delayed fault detection if telemetry or network link is degraded.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating predictive maintenance features from Safety Services to enhance fault detection.

im_boundary.name: Safety Services
im_boundary.scope: Realization of fault detection, diagnostics, and monitoring functions to support availability.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time operational data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts on detected faults and availability issues to operators and safety managers.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between Safety Services and other NGHE modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused containment for fault detection logic.
Physical components have limited scope for diagnostics logic.
Controls operation but less suitable for centralized fault detection.
Best containment for fault detection and diagnostics with minimal diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing fault detection and diagnostics in Safety Services minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential latency in fault detection due to network communication delays.
Dependency on telemetry data integrity and network link availability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Enhance network reliability and telemetry data validation to mitigate containment risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (fault detection system) directly addresses the refined FRs related to minimizing downtime and rapid recovery.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists if fault detection logic overlaps with Teleoperation or Vehicle modules.
Mitigated by clear interface definitions and centralized implementation in Safety Services.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Safety Services module provides strong containment for the DP with well-defined external interfaces.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified by monitoring uptime metrics and fault detection logs within Safety Services.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of fault detection DP to Safety Services IM with defined interfaces to other modules.

recommended_revisions: Consider adding predictive maintenance DP in future refinement to further improve availability.
Review network link robustness to reduce latency and data loss risks.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, incorporating predictive maintenance and enhancing network reliability will strengthen availability assurance.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution.
FR2: Enable rapid detection and recovery from faults within the NGHE solution.

revise.why: To include predictive maintenance and improve fault detection robustness.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
Network link supports required communication bandwidth and latency.
open_risks: Network delays impacting fault detection timeliness.
Potential overlap of fault detection logic across modules.
